subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the call of Husayn at the moment when Shimr stood at His right hand and the spear was raised before His head [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد اسمع ندآء الحسین حین الذی قام الشمر عن یمینه و السنان تلقاء راسه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital
